name: Barbecued Spareribs II
recipeInstructions:
1. Place spareribs in a large, shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 7 minutes.
3. Turn spareribs over and heat an additional 7 minutes.
4. Drain off excess fat.
5. Combine chili powder and barbecue sauce.
6. Pour half of the sauce over ribs.
7. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes.
8. Turn spareribs again.
9. Sprinkle with lemon juice if desired.
10. Pour on remaining sauce and heat, uncovered, for an additional 8 minutes or until fork-tender. Pork should always be cooked until well-done.
